title: What selectors do
description: The basics of picking elements to style.

questions.prompt:
Which selector targets every

element on the page?
questions.explanation: A tag name by itself targets all elements of that type.

questions.prompt: How do you target an element with class="card"?
questions.explanation: A leading dot selects by class.

questions.prompt: Which element gets a red border?
questions.explanation: The id selector targets the element with id="main", which is A.

questions.prompt: Which of these is a universal selector?
